exec: // Default auth: project-editor JWT on project A (sufficient for most happy-path steps).

item.name: ZC-NLB-ZONE-01-NEG-DUALSTACK-CROSS-ZONE — ZONAL dualstack v4/v6 в разных зонах одного региона → sync 400 same-zone (Verifies ZC-NLB-ZONE-01)

exec: pm.test('same-zone verbatim message', () => pm.expect(j.message).to.eql('dualstack load balancer families must resolve to the same zone'));
pm.test('no dual zonal subnet fixture → lawful rejection, never silent 200', () =>     pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.be.oneOf([400, 404, 503]));
if (v !== undefined && v !== null) pm.environment.set('opId', String(v));
if (v !== undefined && v !== null) pm.environment.set('opId', String(v));

item.name: ZC-NLB-ZONE-02-DUALSTACK-SAME-ZONE-OK — ZONAL dualstack обе VIP в одной зоне → sync accept as Operation (Verifies ZC-NLB-ZONE-02)

exec: pm.test('same-zone dualstack accepted as Operation (200, not placement-rejected)', () =>     pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.eql(200));
if (v !== undefined && v !== null) pm.environment.set('opId', String(v));
if (v !== undefined && v !== null) pm.environment.set('opId', String(v));
if (v !== undefined && v !== null) pm.environment.set('opId', String(v));

item.name: ZC-NLB-REGION-01-NEG-SUBNET-WRONG-REGION — INTERNAL REGIONAL LB (R1) + REGIONAL subnet-source региона R2 → sync 400 wrong-region (Verifies ZC-NLB-REGION-01/02)

exec: pm.test('wrong-region verbatim message', () => pm.expect(j.message).to.eql('load balancer vip subnet must be in the same region as the load balancer'));
pm.test('no cross-region subnet fixture → lawful rejection, never silent 200', () =>     pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.be.oneOf([400, 404, 503]));
if (v !== undefined && v !== null) pm.environment.set('opId', String(v));

item.name: ZC-NLB-REGION-03-SAME-REGION-OK — INTERNAL REGIONAL LB (R1) + REGIONAL subnet-source региона R1 → accepted as Operation (Verifies ZC-NLB-REGION-03)

exec: pm.test('same-region subnet accepted as Operation (200, not region-rejected)', () =>     pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.eql(200));
if (v !== undefined && v !== null) pm.environment.set('opId', String(v));
if (v !== undefined && v !== null) pm.environment.set('opId', String(v));
